ch0158_90_carnet/0101_0701_02_10:
Keep life’s brilliance in your heart to shine a
positive light on each day!
ch0158_90_carnet/7101_0701_01_10:
Trainers changing their appearance based
on their bonds with Pokémon...
ch0158_90_carnet/7101_0701_03_10:
Someday, I would love to play a role in a
production about arc suits!
ch0158_90_carnet/7102_0701_01_10:
The way life shines in battle isn’t something
you can see. It’s something you feel.
ch0158_90_carnet/7102_0701_03_10:
You might say arc suits are physical
manifestations of invisible bonds.
ch0158_90_carnet/7103_0701_01_10:
Awakening my arc suit has opened a whole
new path!
ch0158_90_carnet/7103_0701_02_10:
No matter what trials await, I’ll keep moving
and let my life shine!
ch0158_90_carnet/7103_0701_03_10: How was that? Did I sound cool?
ch0158_90_carnet/7104_0701_01_10:
When I’m acting, I’m supported by everyone
involved in the production.
ch0158_90_carnet/7104_0701_02_10:
In Pokémon battles, I have Gardevoir and the
others by my side.
ch0158_90_carnet/7104_0701_03_10:
So to me, bonds are something I cherish that
are always with me.
ch0158_90_carnet/7105_0701_01_10:
I people-watch occasionally for acting
reference.
ch0158_90_carnet/7105_0701_02_10:
I couldn’t help but notice your mannerisms
too, [Name:PlayerNickname ].
ch0158_90_carnet/7105_0701_03_10:
As for what role I was referencing you for...
That’s a secret!
ch0158_90_carnet/1701_0701_01_10: Here! This present is from me.
ch0158_90_carnet/1701_0701_02_10:
May your future be dazzling and full of
hope—and shine even brighter!
ch0158_90_carnet/1701_0702_01_10: Keep showing me your cool side, OK?
ch0158_90_carnet/2501_0701_01_10:
I wonder if the world of Pokémon of legend
could be made into a play.
ch0158_90_carnet/2501_0701_02_10: I suppose it might not have any humans.
ch0158_90_carnet/2501_0701_03_10:
If I played Arceus, I wonder how I’d
portray it.
ch0158_90_carnet/2501_0702_01_10:
I’d like to observe Arceus up close to
prepare for the role!
ch0158_90_carnet/2501_0702_02_10:
It would be amazing if we could be a
sync pair, though.
ch0158_90_carnet/2501_0702_03_10:
We’d cause a scene before I could even
show off my acting!
ch0158_90_carnet/2511_0701_01_10:
Just like Mega Evolution, arc suits don’t last
forever. After some time, the user returns to
their original form.
ch0158_90_carnet/2511_0701_02_10: It’s as if to show nothing is eternal.
ch0158_90_carnet/2511_0701_03_10: If there’s anything that remains, it’d be...
ch0158_90_carnet/2511_0702_01_10:
As long as my work is filmed, my
appearance in it will stay the same.
ch0158_90_carnet/2511_0702_02_10: Then, I’ll live in someone else’s memories.
ch0158_90_carnet/2511_0702_03_10:
Talking about it makes me realize I’m 
fortunate to be an actress!
ch0158_90_carnet/3001_0701_01_10:
Lovely morning, isn’t it? Let’s strive to make
today a story worth telling!
ch0158_90_carnet/3003_0701_01_10: It’s nearly teatime. Care to join me?
ch0158_90_carnet/3005_0701_01_10:
It’s the end of another day... Which is a
great stopping point if you need a change
of pace.
